raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Insatiable Machine,’ by Trevor Jackson
description: A new history by Trevor Jackson argues that the economic system that transformed global living standards depends on endless growth impossible to sustain.

book_title: ‘How Flowers Made Our World,’ by David George Haskell
description: In “How Flowers Made Our World,” David George Haskell makes a case for their soft power.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘The Universal Baseball Association,’ by Robert Coover
book_title: ‘The Universal Baseball Association,’ by Robert Coover
